nodes.name: Sandy scops owl
nodes.summary: Sandy scops owl（Sandy scops owl，学名 Otus icterorhynchus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括热带雨林。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | image2 = Otus icterorhynchus - bureaubenjamin - 350477972.jpeg | taxon = Otus icterorhynchus | authority = (Shelley, 1873) | synonyms = }} The sandy scops owl (Otus icterorhynchus), or cinnamon scops owl, is an owl from the family Strigidae found in Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sandy scops owl has a scattered distribution across the African tropical rainforest ; it has been recorded from Guinea, Liberia, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Cameroon, Gabon, Congo, Democratic Republic of Congo and Central African Republic. The sandy scops owl occurs in lowland evergreen forest, open canopy forest and scrub, or in open forest mosaic land
